title: A high-resolution, high-fidelity individual character portrait of ZIO (half-human half-cat male character based on Stray Kids Felix). He has vibrant blue hair, matching blue cat ears, and intense emerald green eyes. He is wearing a sharp, well-fitted black suit with a clean, professional dark blue necktie. His facial expression is calm and neutral. Slightly increase the thickness of his neck and the width of his shoulders compared to {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_31}} to emphasize a sturdy and powerful build. The style is a hyper-gloss editorial anime aesthetic with soft but defined studio lighting on a solid black background. 4k, ultra-detailed, high resolution, centered composition.

Hyper-gloss editorial anime aesthetic, soft but defined professional studio lighting, 4k, ultra-detailed, high resolution. Maintain the exact facial structure of Jennie.
